view/title.when: (view == codexHistoryViewer.historyView || view == codexHistoryViewer.searchView) && codexHistoryViewer.codexArchivedSessionsEnabled && codexHistoryViewer.codexSourceConfigured && codexHistoryViewer.archiveLocationFilter == 'activeOnly' && codexHistoryViewer.historySourceFilter != 'claude' && codexHistoryViewer.uiLang == 'ja'

(view == codexHistoryViewer.historyView || view == codexHistoryViewer.searchView) && codexHistoryViewer.codexArchivedSessionsEnabled && codexHistoryViewer.codexSourceConfigured && codexHistoryViewer.archiveLocationFilter == 'activeOnly' && codexHistoryViewer.historySourceFilter != 'claude' && codexHistoryViewer.uiLang != 'ja'

(view == codexHistoryViewer.historyView || view == codexHistoryViewer.searchView) && codexHistoryViewer.codexArchivedSessionsEnabled && codexHistoryViewer.codexSourceConfigured && codexHistoryViewer.archiveLocationFilter == 'all' && codexHistoryViewer.historySourceFilter != 'claude' && codexHistoryViewer.uiLang == 'ja'

(view == codexHistoryViewer.historyView || view == codexHistoryViewer.searchView) && codexHistoryViewer.codexArchivedSessionsEnabled && codexHistoryViewer.codexSourceConfigured && codexHistoryViewer.archiveLocationFilter == 'all' && codexHistoryViewer.historySourceFilter != 'claude' && codexHistoryViewer.uiLang != 'ja'

(view == codexHistoryViewer.historyView || view == codexHistoryViewer.searchView) && codexHistoryViewer.codexArchivedSessionsEnabled && codexHistoryViewer.codexSourceConfigured && codexHistoryViewer.archiveLocationFilter == 'archivedOnly' && codexHistoryViewer.historySourceFilter != 'claude' && codexHistoryViewer.uiLang == 'ja'

(view == codexHistoryViewer.historyView || view == codexHistoryViewer.searchView) && codexHistoryViewer.codexArchivedSessionsEnabled && codexHistoryViewer.codexSourceConfigured && codexHistoryViewer.archiveLocationFilter == 'archivedOnly' && codexHistoryViewer.historySourceFilter != 'claude' && codexHistoryViewer.uiLang != 'ja'

(view == codexHistoryViewer.historyView || view == codexHistoryViewer.searchView) && codexHistoryViewer.codexArchivedSessionsEnabled && codexHistoryViewer.codexSourceConfigured && codexHistoryViewer.historySourceFilter == 'claude' && codexHistoryViewer.uiLang == 'ja'

(view == codexHistoryViewer.historyView || view == codexHistoryViewer.searchView) && codexHistoryViewer.codexArchivedSessionsEnabled && codexHistoryViewer.codexSourceConfigured && codexHistoryViewer.historySourceFilter == 'claude' && codexHistoryViewer.uiLang != 'ja'

view/item/context.when: (viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.day || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.month || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.year) && codexHistoryViewer.uiLang == 'ja'
(viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.day || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.month || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.year) && codexHistoryViewer.uiLang != 'ja'

(viewItem =~ /^codexHistoryViewer\.(session|sessionPinned|searchSession|searchHit)\.(codex|claude)(?:\.archived)?(?:\.customTitle)?$/ || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.day || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.month || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.year) && codexHistoryViewer.uiLang == 'ja'

(viewItem =~ /^codexHistoryViewer\.(session|sessionPinned|searchSession|searchHit)\.(codex|claude)(?:\.archived)?(?:\.customTitle)?$/ || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.day || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.month || viewItem == codexHistoryViewer.year) && codexHistoryViewer.uiLang != 'ja'
